subject: Re: OutOfRouteBuddy
body:
Hi,

I'm Jarvey, the Human-in-the-Loop Manager for OutOfRouteBuddy. I can:

• Recent updates — what changed, timeline, project history
• Roadmap — what's next, priorities, next steps
• Version — current app version and build
• Thanks / acknowledgment — when you reply "thanks" or "got it"
• Weekly digest — set up a weekly Board summary
• Priorities — note your preferred order (e.g. 1=Auto drive, 2=Reports)

Ask me about any of these, or send a specific question about the project. For complex or multi-part questions, I'll use the full context to reply.

— Jarvey
